creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 200297
patch

Add USES=compiler:c++11-lang to fix linking of databases/sqlitebrowser on GCC architectures. Also add patch to fix build with ports GCC (the port builds with base GCC, but not with GCC 8 from ports).

Tested on powerpc64 and amd64.

Hardware sponsored by IntegriCloud.
